title: Alcoholism in the family
html:
Stub. The "evil spirit" thread in Yahir's dad arc — vodka, whisky, rum named explicitly in the birthday poem, framed as the cyclical inheritance in Papi (snake-eating-its-tail). The patriarch-targeting force across generations.

Recurring sources:

  • 2020 02 08 voice memo 1422 — first white-hairs reflection (three weeks before dad leaves to Mazatlán)
  • 2020 03 07 papi — rehab departure
  • 2021 10 12 voice memo 1000 — beef-with-dad violence-explosion confession (transcript noisy)
  • 2023 05 05 happy birthday poem — alcohol-as-haunt
  • 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state — relapse cycle

Connections: dad yahir · mom yahir · lineage as fate · narcissist father as mirror
